subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the breezes of God, that which thou hast written was perused with utmost eagerness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید بکمال اشتیاق قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
